findings: CI does not run tests/smoke-test.sh or tests/depth-guard-lint.sh (ci.yml:15-56)
ShellCheck and bash -n only cover bin/*.sh + install.sh, not tests/*.sh (ci.yml:18-30)
Install smoke test writes /tmp/install-ci.sh — risky in restricted CI environments (ci.yml:41-43)
No CI steps for metaswarm commander-specific behavior, nested progress, or child-agent telemetry
Pinned action SHAs present and correctly formatted (ci.yml:16,26)
Trigger gap: no workflow_dispatch or branch protection beyond main (ci.yml:3-7)
YAML frontmatter check covers agents/*.md but not content/behavior (ci.yml:31-36)
